node_kinds.name: dogpark_LargeDogArea
node_kinds.description: Off-leash play area for large dogs

relationship_findings.name: dogpark_FindPatronAccess
relationship_findings.display_name: Patron Can Access Large Dog Area

remediation.short_description: A patron has a dogpark_CanAccess edge to the Large Dog Area environment node
remediation.long_description: The access control system identified a patron with direct access to the Large Dog Area. Verify this access is intentional and current.
remediation.long_remediation: Query the registration system to confirm this patron has a valid membership and authorized access to this area.
